name: Karachay-Cherkessia (Russia)

colors.symbolism: nature, fertility, wealth, youth, wisdom, and restraint
warmth and the closeness and unity of the peoples of Karachay-Cherkessia
the bordering ring around the central emblem

description: Horizontal tricolour of light blue, green, and red, with a central white-ringed roundel showing a yellow sun rising from behind mountains.
history: Adopted on 3 December 1994 by decree of the Supreme Council of the Karachay-Cherkess Republic, with revisions to the description on 26 July 1996.

features.symbolism: the sun rising from behind the mountains, representing the landscape of the republic; framed by a white circular ring.
